glosses.ja: 発明する; でっち上げる

translations.en: I have to make up an excuse.
translations.vi: Tôi phải bịa ra một cái cớ.
translations.nb: Jeg må finne på en unnskyldning.
translations.sv: Jag måste hitta på en ursäkt.
translations.da: Jeg er nødt til at finde på en undskyldning.
translations.ja: 言い訳を考えないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative case; subject, 1st person singular.
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 1st sg) selecting a bare infinitive; expresses necessity.
Indefinite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Ausrede'.
Common noun; head of the accusative direct object of 'erfinden'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'muss'.

sentences.target: Sie will ein neues Wort erfinden.

translations.de: Sie will ein neues Wort erfinden.
translations.en: She wants to invent a new word.
translations.es: Ella quiere inventar una palabra nueva.
translations.fr: Elle veut inventer un nouveau mot.
translations.ko: 그녀는 새로운 단어를 만들고 싶어 해.
translations.pt: Ela quer inventar uma palavra nova.
translations.tr: Yeni bir kelime icat etmek istiyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy muốn nghĩ ra một từ mới.
translations.ar: هي تريد أن تبتكر كلمة جديدة.
translations.nl: Ze wil een nieuw woord bedenken.
translations.hi: वह एक नया शब्द गढ़ना चाहती है।
translations.el: Θέλει να επινοήσει μια καινούργια λέξη.
translations.nb: Hun vil finne på et nytt ord.
translations.id: Dia ingin menciptakan sebuah kata baru.
translations.sv: Hon vill hitta på ett nytt ord.
translations.ro: Ea vrea să inventeze un cuvânt nou.
translations.da: Hun vil finde på et nyt ord.
translations.ja: 彼女は新しい言葉を作りたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative case; subject, 3rd person singular feminine.
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) selecting a bare infinitive; expresses volition.
Indefinite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner of 'Wort'.
Attributive adjective, accusative singular neuter; modifies 'Wort'.
Common noun; head of the accusative direct object of 'erfinden'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Im Labor will er etwas erfinden.

translations.de: Im Labor will er etwas erfinden.
translations.en: In the lab, he wants to invent something.
translations.es: En el laboratorio quiere inventar algo.
translations.fr: Au laboratoire, il veut inventer quelque chose.
translations.ko: 실험실에서 그는 뭔가를 발명하고 싶어 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 他想在实验室里发明点什么。
translations.yue: 喺實驗室佢想發明啲嘢。
translations.ru: В лаборатории он хочет что-нибудь изобрести.
translations.pt: No laboratório, ele quer inventar alguma coisa.
translations.tr: Laboratuvarda bir şey icat etmek istiyor.
translations.vi: Trong phòng thí nghiệm, anh ấy muốn phát minh ra thứ gì đó.
translations.ar: في المختبر يريد أن يخترع شيئًا.
translations.nl: In het lab wil hij iets uitvinden.
translations.uk: У лабораторії він хоче щось винайти.
translations.hu: A laborban valamit fel akar találni.
translations.hi: प्रयोगशाला में वह कुछ आविष्कार करना चाहता है।
translations.el: Στο εργαστήριο θέλει να εφεύρει κάτι.
translations.nb: På laboratoriet vil han finne opp noe.
translations.id: Di laboratorium, dia ingin menciptakan sesuatu.
translations.sv: I labbet vill han uppfinna något.
translations.ro: În laborator, el vrea să inventeze ceva.
translations.da: I laboratoriet vil han opfinde noget.
translations.ja: 彼は研究室で何かを発明したい。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition forming a locative PP and governing dative.
Common noun in dative singular; object of the preposition 'im'.
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) selecting a bare infinitive; expresses volition.
Personal pronoun in nominative case; subject, 3rd person singular masculine.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as the accusative direct object of 'erfinden'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Wir sollen fürs Projekt etwas erfinden.

translations.de: Wir sollen fürs Projekt etwas erfinden.
translations.en: We are supposed to invent something for the project.
translations.es: Se supone que debemos inventar algo para el proyecto.
translations.fr: On est censés inventer quelque chose pour le projet.
translations.it: Dobbiamo inventare qualcosa per il progetto.
translations.ko: 우리는 프로젝트를 위해 뭔가를 발명해야 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们应该为这个项目发明点什么。
translations.yue: 我哋應該為個項目發明啲嘢。
translations.ru: Мы должны придумать что-нибудь для проекта.
translations.pt: Temos que inventar algo para o projeto.
translations.tr: Proje için bir şey icat etmemiz gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cần nghĩ ra thứ gì đó cho dự án.
translations.ar: من المفترض أن نخترع شيئًا للمشروع.
translations.nl: We moeten iets uitvinden voor het project.
translations.uk: Ми маємо винайти щось для проєкту.
translations.hu: A projekthez ki kell találnunk valamit.
translations.hi: हमें परियोजना के लिए कुछ आविष्कार करना है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να εφεύρουμε κάτι για το πρότζεκτ.
translations.nb: Vi skal finne opp noe til prosjektet.
translations.id: Kami seharusnya menciptakan sesuatu untuk proyek ini.
translations.sv: Vi ska uppfinna något till projektet.
translations.ro: Trebuie să inventăm ceva pentru proiect.
translations.da: Vi skal opfinde noget til projektet.
translations.ja: プロジェクトのために何かを発明することになっている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative case; subject, 1st person plural.
Finite modal auxiliary (present, 1st pl) selecting a bare infinitive; expresses obligation.
Contraction of 'für das'; preposition marking a purpose/beneficiary PP and governing accusative.
Common noun in accusative singular; object of the preposition 'fürs'.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as the accusative direct object of 'erfinden'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'sollen'.
